_comment: Record 1 — PASS: valid adult (dob=2001-03-14, age 25), fully verified via document check
Record 2 — PASS: valid teen (dob=2009-11-22, age 16), verified via facial age estimation (most realistic method for smartphone-based registration)

Record 3 — FAIL: under-13 (dob=2014-06-05, age 11) — age_match passes (11==11) but age_minimum_13 + dob_age_gate both fire. GOVERNMENT_ID (passport) is realistic: many UK children have passports. Strong verification does not override the age gate.
Record 4 — WARN: self-declared teen (dob=2010-08-19, age 15), verified_identity=FALSE triggers advisory warning; no method/timestamp required
Record 5 — FAIL: invalid verification_method 'SELFIE_CHECK' not in approved list
Record 6 — FAIL: verified_identity=TRUE but verification_method missing — required_if violation
